Class UserBlockListTBL

java.lang.Object
com.jamii.social.model.UserBlockListTBL
@Entity public class UserBlockListTBL extends Object
JPA Entity representing user block list records in the database.

This class maps to the user_block_list table and stores information about users who have been blocked by other users, preventing interactions between them.

Key fields:

  • id - Primary key
  • userid - User who blocked someone
  • blockedid - User who was blocked
  • status - Status of the block
